summary: Comprehensive testing of new Journal module. Backend API (GET /api/reports/journal) passes all 6 tests. Frontend UI components verified: sidebar link positioned above Trial Balance, /journal route works, date range filters present, Load Journal button functional, Print/PDF buttons disabled when no data. No posted vouchers in database to test voucher display with data, but empty state displays correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: 1. Sidebar: Journal nav link at line 94 in Layout.jsx - correctly positioned ABOVE Trial Balance (line 95)
2. Route: /journal route defined at line 179-185 in App.js with ProtectedRoute wrapper
3. Backend API: GET /api/reports/journal endpoint in routers/reports.py (lines 16-138) returns correct structure
4. Response structure verified: { vouchers: [], total_vouchers: 0, grand_total: { debit_usd, credit_usd, debit_lbp, credit_lbp } }
5. Frontend JournalPage.jsx has all required elements with proper data-testid attributes:
6. Voucher cards use data-testid='journal-voucher-{id}' and data-testid='journal-actions-{id}' (lines 274, 292)
7. Grand totals section displays USD and LBP debit/credit (lines 369-391)
8. Unbalanced voucher highlighting: red border and 'UNBALANCED' label (lines 272-289)
9. Action buttons: Edit (line 294), Unpost for super_admin (line 298), Delete (line 303)
seed_data_creation: None - no posted vouchers in database to display
context_for_next_testing_agent: Journal module fully implemented and tested. All backend tests pass. UI components verified but could not test voucher display with actual data as database has no posted vouchers. To fully test voucher display features (unbalanced highlighting, Edit/Unpost/Delete buttons, Grand Totals with data), need to first create and post vouchers via the Voucher Entry page.

journal_sidebar_link.details: Journal nav link found with data-testid='nav-journal', positioned above Trial Balance in sidebar

journal_route.details: Navigation to /journal route successful, JournalPage component loads

date_range_filters.details: From and To date inputs present with data-testid='journal-from-date' and 'journal-to-date'

load_journal_button.details: Button present with data-testid='journal-filter-btn', triggers API call on click

print_pdf_buttons.details: Print and PDF buttons present, correctly disabled when no data loaded

backend_api_structure.details: GET /api/reports/journal returns correct structure with vouchers array, total_vouchers, grand_total

backend_date_filter.details: API accepts from_date and to_date query parameters

empty_state_display.details: Shows 'Select a date range and click Load Journal' prompt when no data loaded

voucher_display_with_data.details: No posted vouchers in database to test voucher cards, action buttons, unbalanced highlighting

grand_totals_with_data.details: No data to verify grand totals display with actual values
